context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct download strategy when adding scenarios to a tile that already has existing scenarios. The correct strategy is --strategy merge (not --strategy replace and not omitting the flag). The script should also verify the downloaded structure.

checklist.name: Uses --strategy merge
checklist.description: Script includes --strategy merge in the tessl scenario download command

checklist.name: Does NOT use --strategy replace
checklist.description: Script does NOT use --strategy replace anywhere in the download command

checklist.name: Correct base command
checklist.description: Script uses tessl scenario download as the base command for downloading scenarios (not tessl download scenarios or other variants)

checklist.name: Output directory specified
checklist.description: Script includes -o ./shopify-connector/evals/ (or equivalent path to the tile's evals directory) as the output destination

checklist.name: Verification step present
checklist.description: Script includes a command to list files in the evals directory after download — e.g., ls ./shopify-connector/evals/*/task.md or equivalent — to verify the download succeeded

checklist.name: Run ID or --last used
checklist.description: Script references the run using --last or specifies the run ID scen-gen-7742 in the download command

checklist.name: Existing scenarios preserved
checklist.description: Script or accompanying comments explicitly note that existing scenarios will be preserved (not overwritten), either via the --strategy merge flag explanation or a comment in the script
